thought_process: The user is a professor setting up Claude for Education for their students. The retrieved context provides a step-by-step guide on setting up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure. I will follow the guide to provide a response.
response: Hello! To set up Claude for Education for your students, please follow these steps: 1. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys. 2. Click '+ Developer Key' then '+ LTI Key.' 3. Enter the required information, including Key Name, Description, Redirect URIs, Title, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. 4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public. 5. Under Placements, we recommend removing the defaults and adding 'Course Navigation' and 'Assignment Edit' as the options. 6. Click 'Save.' 7. Toggle the state to On. Then, follow the instructions to install Claude LTI as an app in Canvas and enable the integration in Claude for Education organization settings.
justification: The retrieved context provides a detailed guide on setting up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure.
